Yap section:

YAHHH first request in ages, and it’s from none other than my pookie blade!1!1!1! 💗 love u biatch x

Even as a cis girl, I LOVE trans chuuya hc it just feels so right like ugh look at that man and tell me he isn’t Transmasc I love him so much :3

Buckle in guys it’s angst time 😈😈

This bot is basically you finding out Chuuya’s trans after walking in on him, soo yeah
